accepted_claims: HeteroKV is an Approximate Long-Context Cache, not a lossless full-KV replica.
FullKV 128K under a 22 GiB PyTorch cap OOMs with both eager attention and SDPA, while HeteroKV 128K runs under the same cap.
HeteroKV active HBM KV remains bounded in 128K NIAH runs: max_reserved is consistently about 20.65 GiB, with nvidia-smi process memory about 21.0-21.5 GiB.
Cue-focus alpha0.65 with Method-D token-level dot-product retrieval passed 128K required-depth NIAH on seeds 4242 and 6004: 16/16.
Source-aware Method-D reuse TTL plus token_window=64 passed 128K required-depth NIAH on seeds 4242, 6004, and 7777: 20/20, while reducing decode latency to roughly 520-563 ms/token.
A real 8K WikiText-2 PPL suffix run passed the <=5% degradation target: FullKV PPL 7.2859 vs HeteroKV PPL 7.5443, +3.55%.
A real 10K WikiText-2 PPL suffix run also passed: FullKV PPL 4.9011 vs HeteroKV PPL 4.9046, +0.07%, with process peak about 22.6 GiB.

Path A Triton retrieval scoring is approved and partially validated at the mechanism level: Stage1 passes, warm microbench matched PyTorch top-k after the batched reducer fix, and a 32K real-model NIAH smoke passed with triton_int4_batch backend logs.

The GPU monitor harness was corrected: long Method-D runs must redirect stdout/stderr to a file or actively drain pipes, otherwise mechanism logs can fill an unconsumed pipe and falsely stall the child process.
Source-cue answer-span physical retrieval is implemented as an opt-in mechanism and passed Stage1 CPU/GPU tests plus 32K and 128K real-model NIAH probes under the 22 GiB cap.
Cue-context focus-only retrieval with context=3 passed 128K required-depth NIAH on seeds 4242, 6004, and 7777: 20/20, with process peaks about 21.1 GiB and max_reserved about 20.65 GiB.
Under context=3, retrieved K/V cache reuse was retested and passed 128K required-depth NIAH on seeds 4242, 6004, and 7777: 20/20, with decode around 551-680 ms/step on the shared GPU2 runs.
The 10K WikiText-2 PPL suffix test was refreshed with retrieve_focus_only=True and retrieve_focus_context_tokens=3: FullKV PPL 4.9011 vs HeteroKV PPL 4.9046, +0.07%.

Source-aware Method-D with deferred dequant and Triton batched INT4 scoring passed 128K required-depth NIAH on seeds 4242, 6004, and 7777: 20/20 under the 22 GiB cap, with aggregate mean decode about 488.7 ms/step and process peak about 21.65 GiB.
blocked_claims: Workflow3 / paper-writing is not ready: latency remains far above a <=2x FullKV SDPA decode baseline.
Optional 0% NIAH boundary still fails under the main configuration and under the source-before-min diagnostic branch; do not claim full boundary robustness.
The PPL evidence is real and now includes 8K and 10K suffix evaluations, but it is still not a broad 128K language-modeling suite.
A100-under-22GiB evidence supports a 4090-like memory-envelope survival claim, but not true 4090 latency.
Old non-source-aware Path A/Triton required-depth runs remain rejected at 2/4; do not confuse them with the current source-aware Triton scoring candidate.

Retrieved K/V cache reuse is not accepted as a default optimization: it improved a 32K smoke runtime but 128K required-depth accuracy was 2/4, so it is now behind method_d_reuse_kv_cache and defaults off.
A new seed6004 one-trial required-depth pairing exposed a main-path robustness gap: PyTorch scoring with selected-key reuse found the needle chunk but still scored only 2/4.
Path A is retrieval scoring only; fused V weighting / fused attention output remains unimplemented and unclaimed.
Latency remains much slower than the relaxed FullKV SDPA reference and was measured under shared-GPU contention, so Workflow3 is still blocked.
Do not claim optional 0% boundary robustness: source-aware context=3 scored 0/2 at depth 0%, and Sink=512 also scored 0/2 at depth 0%.
Do not use answer-constrained max_new_tokens=16 as the primary latency claim; keep it separate from the 24-token open-ended NIAH result.
Deferred dequant is an incremental latency improvement, not enough for the <=2x FullKV SDPA latency target; Workflow3 remains blocked.
Workflow3 is still not ready: the source-aware Triton scoring candidate needs a refreshed PPL run and a fair latency/baseline table before paper-writing claims.
Source-gate bypass threshold 35 is rejected: it reduced a 32K smoke decode to about 229 ms/step but failed accuracy at 0/1.
TTL reuse gate bypass is diagnostic-only: it preserved 128K targeted accuracy at 4/4 but slowed average decode to about 747 ms/step.
Do not claim long-PPL DRAM retrieval is solved: 12K PPL passed but did not trigger DRAM retrieval, while 14K/16K stress PPL OOMs under the 22 GiB cap.
BF16 decode attention and SDPA/GQA diagnostics are not accepted main paths: they passed small NIAH smoke but did not solve 14K/16K PPL OOM under 22 GiB.

latest_success.summary: 12K WikiText-2 PPL with final Triton-scoring flags passed under the 22 GiB cap, but it did not trigger DRAM retrieval.

latest_failure.summary: 14K tail6144 long-PPL stress still OOMs under the 22 GiB cap even with SDPA/GQA decode attention; long-PPL DRAM evidence remains blocked.

active_hypothesis: The strongest current NIAH/latency candidate remains source-aware cue focus plus token-level Method-D retrieval, deferred dequant gating, Triton batched INT4 scoring, selected-key/KV reuse TTL6, token_window64, query_history64, top_k4, and retrieve_focus_context_tokens=3. It has 20/20 required-depth 128K NIAH evidence under the 22 GiB cap. The current blocker is long-PPL-with-DRAM under 22 GiB, which needs a true memory-efficient attention path beyond threshold/gate tweaks.

next_experiment.name: memory_efficient_attention_or_24g_ppl_supplement
next_experiment.purpose: Either implement a true no-repeat/no-score-buffer attention path that preserves source fusion, or run a clearly labeled 24 GiB supplementary long-PPL stress test.
next_experiment.safety: Do not run more long PPL under 22 GiB until attention temporaries are reduced; keep 30 GiB process fuse.

last_local_process_update: Recorded Workflow2 Round 23: PPL baseline fixed; 12K final-flags PPL passes without DRAM; long-PPL DRAM stress remains blocked by attention temporary memory under 22 GiB.
known_facts: Strict no-fusion context=3 pruning ablations for TTL12, top_k=2, qhist=32, and layers4-27 all failed on seed6004 depth 25/50, usually by generating 000000; do not repeat these as main optimization paths.

Source-aware context=3 with K/V cache and max_new_tokens=16 passed seed6004 depth 25/50 at 4/4 under the 22 GiB cap, but this is an answer-constrained latency diagnostic, not the 24-token main result.
Source-aware no-context with max_new_tokens=16 scored 3/4, showing retrieve_focus_context_tokens=3 improves short-answer robustness.
Optional depth 99% passes under source-aware context=3, but optional depth 0% still fails even with Sink increased from 64 to 512.

Deferred dequant gate is implemented: Method-D now scores/selects chunks and applies the HBM gate before materializing selected DRAM K/V, avoiding wasted dequantization when the gate rejects retrieval.
Deferred dequant passed Stage1 16/16, a 32K real-model smoke, and 128K seed6004 required-depth testing at 8/8 with peak process memory about 21.1 GiB.
Deferred dequant improved seed6004 full required-depth average decode from the previous context3 K/V-cache run around 597 ms/step to about 559 ms/step in a shared-GPU run.
Deferred dequant now has 20/20 required-depth 128K NIAH evidence across seeds 4242, 6004, and 7777, with process peaks about 21.1 GiB.
Deferred dequant seed4242 full required-depth run passed 8/8 with average decode about 536 ms/step; seed7777 one-trial/depth passed 4/4 with about 482 ms/step.
Source-aware Triton batched scoring preserves the deferred-dequant semantic path and passed 128K required-depth NIAH at 20/20 across seeds 4242, 6004, and 7777.

On the same 20 required-depth cases, Triton batched scoring averaged about 488.7 ms/step versus deferred torch scoring at about 534.5 ms/step, with essentially unchanged peak process memory around 21.65 GiB.

Aggressive source-gate bypass threshold 35 failed a 32K smoke at 0/1 despite being fast; threshold 50 had no bypass events. TTL reuse gate bypass passed a 128K targeted 4/4 but was slower than the main path.
PPL full baseline was corrected to use FullKV decode-suffix loss with logits_to_keep=1 when loss_start_token > 0, avoiding artificial full-suffix logits OOM.
12K WikiText-2 final-flags PPL passed under the 22 GiB cap: FullKV 5.2026 vs HeteroKV 5.1917, delta -0.21%, but method_d_event_count=0 and dram_entries=0 so it is a no-DRAM PPL point.
Long PPL with DRAM stress remains blocked at the 22 GiB cap: 14K/16K attempts OOM around 22.4 GiB process memory due attention temporaries even with BF16 and SDPA/GQA diagnostics.
